'''Omo Taj''' was a leader of the [[Carosite]] people during the rule of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Taj allowed the construction of the secret [[New Republic outpost]] on [[Carosi XII]] which was commanded by [[Balderik Rajana]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1992-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]'' {{1stm}}
